{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Serrian
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Serrian]] is the new Yellow [[Titan Knight]] and a human woman specializing in [[Subspace]] megafauna.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
